{{Quote|The remnants of the ''38th Armoured Battalion''... Six engineers on ''life-support'', four more with ''long-term injuries''... As beaten as their battletank.|[[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]]|<ref name="Repel All Boarders!">{{TCWComicCite|6.18|Repel All Boarders!}}</ref>}}
The '''38th Armored Division''' was a unit of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Combat Engineer Battalion]] was a subdivision of this unit.

==Characteristics==
[[File:38thArmoredDivision-RepelAllBoarders.jpg|thumb|left|300px|[[Clone engineer]]s of the 38th Armored Division.]]
The [[Armor/Legends|armor]] of this [[Division/Legends|division]] was painted with dull [[Color/Legends|mustard]] markings. Heavy artillery [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] in the [[Combat Engineer Battalion]] subdivision of the 38th Armored were marked with similar markings, but with brown coloring instead of the dull mustard of the rest of the 38th.

The 38th Armored Division included many heavy artillery units such as [[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|HAVw A6 Juggernauts]] and [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery#Main weapons|Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery-Turbolaser (SPHA-T)]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcer]], and [[AV-7 Antivehicle Cannon/Legends|Republic Artillery Guns]]. The division was also equipped with [[Nu-class attack shuttle/Legends|''Nu''-class attack shuttles]] and [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry]] gunships. In addition to regular troopers, the unit had a heavily armored trooper variant.

==History==
It participated in numerous battles of the war, including the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], where it was led into combat by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]].
